arguments.command:
# Check AIFunction creation patterns and AITool
grep -A5 'name="M:Microsoft.Extensions.AI.AIFunction' ~/.nuget/packages/microsoft.extensions.ai.abstractions/10.5.0/lib/net10.0/Microsoft.Extensions.AI.Abstractions.xml | head -40

echo ""
echo "=== AITool type ==="
grep -A5 'name="T:Microsoft.Extensions.AI.AITool"' ~/.nuget/packages/microsoft.extensions.ai.abstractions/10.5.0/lib/net10.0/Microsoft.Extensions.AI.Abstractions.xml

echo ""
echo "=== AIFunctionFactory ==="
grep -oP 'name="[TM]:Microsoft.Extensions.AI.AIFunctionFactory[^"]*"' ~/.nuget/packages/microsoft.extensions.ai.abstractions/10.5.0/lib/net10.0/Microsoft.Extensions.AI.Abstractions.xml | head -20

Initializes a new instance of the class. The chat client to use when running the agent. Optional system instructions that guide the agent's behavior. These instructions are provided to the with each invocation to establish the agent's role and behavior. Optional name for the agent. This name is used for identification and logging purposes. -- Initializes a new instance of the class. The chat client to use when running the agent. Configuration options that control all aspects of the agent's behavior, including chat settings, chat history provider factories, context provider factories, and other advanced configurations. Optional logger factory for creating loggers used by the agent and its components. -- A new instance. Creates a new instance. A new instance. Custom -derived type for the InvalidNameCharsRegex method. Cached, thread-safe singleton instance. Initializes the instance. === ChatClientAgentOptions === Gets or sets the agent id. Gets or sets the agent name. Gets or sets the agent description. Gets or sets the default chatOptions to use. Gets or sets the instance to use for providing chat history for this agent. Gets or sets the list of instances to use for providing additional context for each agent run. Gets or sets a value indicating whether to use the provided instance as is, without applying any default decorators. -- Gets or sets a value indicating whether to set the to === AIAgentExtensions === Creates a new using the specified agent as the foundation for the builder pipeline. The instance to use as the inner agent. A new instance configured with the specified inner agent. -- Creates an that runs the provided . The to be represented as an invocable function. -- Removes characters from AI agent name that shouldn't be used in an AI function name. The AI agent name to sanitize. -- Pattern:
[^0-9A-Za-z]+
Explanation:
=== AgentResponse ===

        <member name="M:Microsoft.Agents.AI.AIAgentBuilder.Use(System.Func{System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{Microsoft.Extensions.AI.ChatMessage},Microsoft.Agents.AI.AgentSession,Microsoft.Agents.AI.AgentRunOptions,Microsoft.Agents.AI.AIAgent,System.Threading.CancellationToken,System.Threading.Tasks.Task{Microsoft.Agents.AI.AgentResponse}},System.Func{System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{Microsoft.Extensions.AI.ChatMessage},Microsoft.Agents.AI.AgentSession,Microsoft.Agents.AI.AgentRunOptions,Microsoft.Agents.AI.AIAgent,System.Threading.CancellationToken,System.Collections.Generic.IAsyncEnumerable{Microsoft.Agents.AI.AgentResponseUpdate}})">

            <paramref name="runStreamingFunc"/> must be non-null, and the implementation of <see cref="M:Microsoft.Agents.AI.AIAgent.RunAsync(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{Microsoft.Extensions.AI.ChatMessage},Microsoft.Agents.AI.AgentSession,Microsoft.Agents.AI.AgentRunOptions,System.Threading.CancellationToken)"/>

When <see langword="null"/>,
            <paramref name="runFunc"/> must be non-null, and the implementation of <see cref="M:Microsoft.Agents.AI.AIAgent.RunStreamingAsync(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{Microsoft.Extensions.AI.ChatMessage},Microsoft.Agents.AI.AgentSession,Microsoft.Agents.AI.AgentRunOptions,System.Threading.CancellationToken)"/>

            <see cref="M:Microsoft.Agents.AI.AIAgent.RunAsync(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{Microsoft.Extensions.AI.ChatMessage},Microsoft.Agents.AI.AgentSession,Microsoft.Agents.AI.AgentRunOptions,System.Threading.CancellationToken)"/> will be implemented by combining the updates from <paramref name="runStreamingFunc"/>.
            <see cref="M:Microsoft.Agents.AI.AIAgent.RunAsync(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{Microsoft.Extensions.AI.ChatMessage},Microsoft.Agents.AI.AgentSession,Microsoft.Agents.AI.AgentRunOptions,System.Threading.CancellationToken)"/> or

This delegate is invoked with the list of messages, the agent
        <member name="M:Microsoft.Agents.AI.AIAgentBuilder.Use(System.Func{System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{Microsoft.Extensions.AI.ChatMessage},Microsoft.Agents.AI.AgentSession,Microsoft.Agents.AI.AgentRunOptions,Microsoft.Agents.AI.AIAgent,System.Threading.CancellationToken,System.Threading.Tasks.Task{Microsoft.Agents.AI.AgentResponse}},System.Func{System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{Microsoft.Extensions.AI.ChatMessage},Microsoft.Agents.AI.AgentSession,Microsoft.Agents.AI.AgentRunOptions,Microsoft.Agents.AI.AIAgent,System.Threading.CancellationToken,System.Collections.Generic.IAsyncEnumerable{Microsoft.Agents.AI.AgentResponseUpdate}})">
            an implementation for both <see cref="M:Microsoft.Agents.AI.AIAgent.RunAsync(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{Microsoft.Extensions.AI.ChatMessage},Microsoft.Agents.AI.AgentSession,Microsoft.Agents.AI.AgentRunOptions,System.Threading.CancellationToken)"/> and <see cref="M:Microsoft.Agents.AI.AIAgent.RunStreamingAsync(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{Microsoft.Extensions.AI.ChatMessage},Microsoft.Agents.AI.AgentSession,Microsoft.Agents.AI.AgentRunOptions,System.Threading.CancellationToken)"/>.
            A delegate that provides the implementation for <see cref="M:Microsoft.Agents.AI.AIAgent.RunAsync(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{Microsoft.Extensions.AI.ChatMessage},Microsoft.Agents.AI.AgentSession,Microsoft.Agents.AI.AgentRunOptions,System.Threading.CancellationToken)"/>. When <see langword="null"/>,
            <paramref name="runStreamingFunc"/> must be non-null, and the implementation of <see cref="M:Microsoft.Agents.AI.AIAgent.RunAsync(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{Microsoft.Extensions.AI.ChatMessage},Microsoft.Agents.AI.AgentSession,Microsoft.Agents.AI.AgentRunOptions,System.Threading.CancellationToken)"/>

When <see langword="null"/>,
            <paramref name="runFunc"/> must be non-null, and the implementation of <see cref="M:Microsoft.Agents.AI.AIAgent.RunStreamingAsync(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{Microsoft.Extensions.AI.ChatMessage},Microsoft.Agents.AI.AgentSession,Microsoft.Agents.AI.AgentRunOptions,System.Threading.CancellationToken)"/>
            <paramref name="runFunc"/> will provide the implementation of <see cref="M:Microsoft.Agents.AI.AIAgent.RunAsync(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{Microsoft.Extensions.AI.ChatMessage},Microsoft.Agents.AI.AgentSession,Microsoft.Agents.AI.AgentRunOptions,System.Threading.CancellationToken)"/>, and
            <paramref name="runStreamingFunc"/> will provide the implementation of <see cref="M:Microsoft.Agents.AI.AIAgent.RunStreamingAsync(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{Microsoft.Extensions.AI.ChatMessage},Microsoft.Agents.AI.AgentSession,Microsoft.Agents.AI.AgentRunOptions,System.Threading.CancellationToken)"/>.
            is supplied without <paramref name="runStreamingFunc"/>, the implementation of <see cref="M:Microsoft.Agents.AI.AIAgent.RunStreamingAsync(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{Microsoft.Extensions.AI.ChatMessage},Microsoft.Agents.AI.AgentSession,Microsoft.Agents.AI.AgentRunOptions,System.Threading.CancellationToken)"/>
            <see cref="M:Microsoft.Agents.AI.AIAgent.RunAsync(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{Microsoft.Extensions.AI.ChatMessage},Microsoft.Agents.AI.AgentSession,Microsoft.Agents.AI.AgentRunOptions,System.Threading.CancellationToken)"/> will be implemented by combining the updates from <paramref name="runStreamingFunc"/>.
            <see cref="M:Microsoft.Agents.AI.AIAgent.RunAsync(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{Microsoft.Extensions.AI.ChatMessage},Microsoft.Agents.AI.AgentSession,Microsoft.Agents.AI.AgentRunOptions,System.Threading.CancellationToken)"/> or

data.reasoningText:
Now I have a solid understanding of the API. Let me build the app. Here's my plan:

1. Use `Microsoft.Extensions.AI.OpenAI` to create an `IChatClient` with the OpenAI API
2. Use `FunctionInvokingChatClient` to enable tool calling  
3. Create a `ChatClientAgent` with tools for web search and note-taking
4. The agent will use `AIFunctionFactory.Create` to define the tools

Let me write the implementation:

- **Web Search Tool**: Uses `HttpClient` to search the web (Bing or a simple web scraper, or we can use a basic search approach). Since we don't have an actual search API key, I'll implement it using a web search approach. I could use a simple HTTP-based search.


- **Note-Taking Tool**: Stores notes in memory as the agent gathers information.

The agent will follow a loop where the user provides a research topic, it searches for relevant information, takes notes on what it finds, and then delivers a summary. I'll use `ChatClientAgent` with the `AsAIAgent` extension method to set up the tools and run the agent. Let me check what `ChatClientAgent.RunAsync` returns—I think it's an `AgentResponse`.

data.reasoningText:
Now I have enough understanding. Let me build the Program.cs. Here's the architecture:

1. Create an `IChatClient` using `OpenAI` (through `Microsoft.Extensions.AI.OpenAI`)
2. Wrap it with `FunctionInvokingChatClient` via the builder pattern
3. Create a `ChatClientAgent` with tools:
   - `SearchWeb` - uses HttpClient to search the web
   - `AddNote` / `GetNotes` - in-memory note-taking
4. Run the agent in a loop

The `ChatClientAgent` supports `RunAsync(string, AgentSession, ...)` which takes a text message. The agent manages the conversation history via its session.


I'll pull the API key from environment variables to handle configuration safely, then write out the full implementation with the tools class, client setup, and interactive loop.

        <member name="M:Microsoft.Agents.AI.ChatClientAgent.RunAsync(Microsoft.Agents.AI.AgentSession,Microsoft.Agents.AI.ChatClientAgentRunOptions,System.Threading.CancellationToken)">
            <summary>
            Run the agent with no message assuming that all required instructions are already provided to the agent or on the session.
            </summary>
            <param name="session">
            The conversation session to use for this invocation. If <see langword="null"/>, a new session will be created.
            The session will be updated with any response messages generated during invocation.
            </param>
            <param name="options">Configuration parameters for controlling the agent's invocation behavior.</param>
--
            <returns>A task that represents the asynchronous operation. The task result contains an <see cref="T:Microsoft.Agents.AI.AgentResponse"/> with the agent's output.</returns>
        </member>

data.content:
The app builds and runs correctly. Here's what was built:

**ResearchAgent** — a .NET 10 console app using `Microsoft.Agents.AI` + `Microsoft.Extensions.AI.OpenAI` with 5 tools across 2 categories:

| Tool | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `SearchWeb` | Queries DuckDuckGo and returns titles, URLs, snippets |
| `ReadWebPage` | Fetches a URL and extracts text content |
| `AddNote` | Saves a research finding |
| `GetNotes` | Retrieves all saved notes |
| `ClearNotes` | Resets the notepad |

**How it works:**
1. A `ChatClientAgent` is created from an OpenAI `IChatClient` with `FunctionInvokingChatClient` in the pipeline for automatic tool calling
2. The agent follows instructions to search → read pages → take notes → summarize
3. Tool activity is printed to the console in real-time (🔍/📄/📝)

**Configuration** via environment variables:
- `OPENAI_API_KEY` (required)
- `OPENAI_MODEL` (default: `gpt-4o-mini`)
- `OPENAI_BASE_URL` (optional, for custom endpoints)
